instruction: The red horizontal strikethrough on the numbered list icon got recolored muted blue. Restore its original color.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/numbered-list.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M8.242 5.992h12m-12 6.003H20.24m-12 5.999h12M4.117 7.495v-3.75H2.99m1.125 3.75H2.99m1.125 0H5.24m-1.92 2.577a1.125 1.125 0 1 1 1.591 1.59l-1.83 1.83h2.16M2.99 15.745h1.125a1.125 1.125 0 0 1 0 2.25H3.74m0-.002h.375a1.125 1.125 0 0 1 0 2.25H2.99"/></g>
  <line id="overstrike" stroke="#2c70ec" stroke-width="2" x1="16" y1="64" x2="112" y2="64" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">

  <line id="overstrike" stroke="#e63946" stroke-width="2" x1="16" y1="64" x2="112" y2="64" />
